result: Schema update complete. This guarded patch adds narrow, evidence-backed clarifications to explain positive transfer across 6 tasks while sharpening the boundary with analytic-pipeline. All incumbent items preserved since no protected regressions exist. The update makes explicit that workflow stages are appropriate when they serve the artifact contract, and clarifies when to choose artifact-generation over analytic-pipeline based on task objective and verifier mode.

acceptance_notes: guarded_patch mode: treating current schema as stable base, making minimal evidence-backed additions
positive transfer evidence (6 tasks, +46.67pp mean delta) supports narrow patches to explain gains
no protected regressions, so no removals needed from incumbent slots
all 3 assigned tasks show pipeline+staged-multi-step pattern, requiring explicit workflow acknowledgment
6 near-boundary losses to analytic-pipeline require boundary sharpening
earthquake-phase-association (benchmark-threshold verifier) lost to analytic-pipeline by 20pp, confirming expected_bad_fit about benchmark-gated tasks

challenger_guidance.conservative: preserve all incumbent slot items; they explain core artifact-generation wins on exceltable-in-ppt (100.0) and earthquake-plate-calculation (60.0)
challenger_guidance.exploratory: investigate why 2 of 3 assigned tasks have analytic-pipeline as task_object_seed despite artifact-generation winning assignment; may reveal deeper workflow-vs-artifact tensions
challenger_guidance.differentiating: sharpen boundary with analytic-pipeline using verifier_mode signals: artifact-generation should win deterministic-artifact cases, lose benchmark-threshold cases; test on borderline tasks with both pipeline structure and artifact outputs

expected_effect: narrow patch should explain positive transfer on 6 tasks without broadening schema scope
explicit workflow acknowledgment should reduce confusion on pipeline-structured artifact tasks
boundary sharpening should help differentiator choose artifact-generation for deterministic-artifact verifiers, analytic-pipeline for benchmark-threshold verifiers
expected to maintain ~80.0 mean score on assigned tasks while improving borderline case routing
no regression risk since no incumbent items removed and no protected regressions exist

keep: all 4 emphasize items (exact output schema, preservation constraints, missing-input detection, final reviewer pass)
all 3 avoid items (unnecessary scaffolding, speculative filling, unnecessary tool usage)
all 3 expected_good_fit items (form filling, formatting/conversion, single-artifact generation)
all 3 expected_bad_fit items (benchmark-gated repair, control loops, deep retrieval synthesis)
add: emphasize: workflow stages serving artifact contract
expected_good_fit: pipeline workflows with deterministic artifact outputs
expected_bad_fit: borderline pipeline tasks where analytic-pipeline emphasis is more central
hypothesized_primary_failure_modes: boundary ambiguity with analytic-pipeline on pipeline+benchmark tasks
sharpen: expected_bad_fit: expand benchmark-gated item to include threshold-based quality gates
exclude: global regression patterns (none exist in evidence)
speculative workflow additions not grounded in positive transfer pairs
removals of incumbent items (no protected regressions to address)

add: workflow stages that serve the artifact contract as deterministic transformations toward required output (e.g., extract→transform→verify for format conversions)

boundary with analytic-pipeline: select artifact-generation when task objective centers on producing a specific output artifact meeting an explicit contract, not exploratory pipeline analysis or benchmark optimization
artifact transformations within pipeline workflows where each stage serves a deterministic output contract
tasks with deterministic-artifact-plus-stage-check verifier mode requiring staged validation
tasks where pipeline workflow or benchmark optimization is central to task identity rather than serving a constrained artifact goal
boundary ambiguity with analytic-pipeline on tasks combining pipeline structure with artifact outputs, especially when benchmark thresholds are involved
